segments.title: 异形巢穴中的希望 / Hope in the Nest
segments.summary: 海军陆战队队员深入被异形袭击的设施，发现一场激烈战斗的痕迹。在医疗区，他们找到两名幸存者，并发现有人试图移除异形胚胎而丧命。随后，队员们在黑暗中遭遇未知威胁，最终在一个隐蔽处发现并成功救出惊恐的小女孩Newt。

segments.title: 创伤中的联结 / Connection in Trauma
segments.summary: 里普利耐心照顾幸存小女孩Newt，得知她的真名以及家人可能已遇难的悲剧。尽管军队承诺保护，Newt表示在异形威胁下无处可逃。同时，军队发现幸存者位置，准备行动救援。

segments.title: 被迫解除 / Forced Disarmament
segments.summary: 海军陆战队队员以V字形部署深入设施，发现异形分泌的树脂。薇普警告士兵们位于热交换器下方，开火可能导致热核爆炸。指挥官被迫下令收缴所有弹药，仅允许使用火焰武器。就在士兵们解除武装后，突然发现异常情况，紧急命令小女孩Newt到前方位置。

segments.title: 致命感染 / Fatal Infection
segments.summary: 海军陆战队队员执行搜索任务时发现一名幸存者。在试图营救过程中，幸存者突然抽搐变异，袭击周围队员。危急时刻，Frost使用火焰喷射器才得以控制局势，暴露了现场面临的致命异形威胁。

segments.title: 四面楚歌 / Surrounded
segments.summary: 军小队在异形巢穴中遭遇伏击，热成像无法检测到异形，导致多人被杀。指挥官Apone阵亡，Ripley接管指挥权，带领幸存者试图突围。队伍陷入混乱，部分成员被异形拖走，剩余人员面临生死存亡的考验。

segments.title: 生死抉择 / Life-or-Death Decision
segments.summary: 军队在逃离异形巢穴时面临生死抉择：是否牺牲可能还活着的战友，从轨道轰炸确保安全。公司代表为保护设施价值反对轰炸，但Hicks最终下令撤离并摧毁基地。撤离途中载具遭袭，有人牺牲，命令全体人员紧急逃跑。

segments.title: 领袖崛起 / Rise of a Leader
segments.summary: 蕾普利带领绝望的幸存者们检查装备，得知需等待17天救援，霍克斯认为他们连几小时都撑不过去。蕾普利展现坚定领导力，压制团队恐慌，命令霍克斯绘制建筑平面图，制定防御策略。团队协作分析布局，设置机器人哨兵，安装定位器互相关照，为迎战异形威胁做准备。

segments.title: 母女承诺 / Mother's Promise
segments.summary: Ripley与小女孩Newt建立深厚感情，向她承诺永不离开。军事小组发现异形可能存在蜂后，并揭露Burke的背叛是导致殖民地悲剧的原因。在激烈战斗中，他们弹药耗尽，又得知飞船将在4小时内爆炸，陷入绝境。

segments.title: 自我牺牲 / Sacrificial Mission
segments.summary: Bishop主动承担修复天线任务，人类幸存者抵抗异形进攻，Bishop成功修复通信系统。幸存者们加强防御，Ripley教导小女孩使用武器，准备迎接最终决战。

subtitles.text: Sir, we got the CPU on-line. No problem.
they sealed off this wing at both ends, welded the doors...
and blocked off the stairs with heavy equipment.
But it looks like the barricade didn't hold.
Must have been a hell of a fight.
We should be able to cut through the med lab to Operations.
Looks like love at first sight to me.
Two are alive. The rest are dead.
"Subject Marachuk, John J., died during the procedure."
They killed him taking it off.
I think we got something here.
Don't be afraid. Come on. We won't hurt you.
Shh. It's all right. It's OK.
Come on out. Come on. Easy.
Frost, get your light up here.
Grab her. We're gonna lose her.
You're gonna be all right now.
Easy. Easy. It's gonna be OK.
It's all right. You're gonna be OK.
Look, Rebecca, you have to try-
Gorman, give it a rest, why don't you?
Borderline malnutrition, but no permanent damage.
I made a clean spot here.
Guess I'll have to do the whole thing.
Hard to believe there's a little girl under all this.
You don't talk much, do you?
Tell me what you're scanning for.
Every colonist had one surgically implanted.
If they're within twenty klicks, we'll read it out here.
I don't know how you stayed alive...
but you're one brave kid, Rebecca.
Nobody calls me Rebecca except my brother.
What about your brother? What's his name?
They're dead, all right? Can I go now?
Don't you think you'd be safer here with us?
These people are here to protect you.
Hello, Bishop. Do you need anything else?
Yo! Stop your grinnin' and drop your linen!
Unknown, but it looks like all of them...
It looks like a goddamn town meeting.
Let's go. They ain't payin' us by the hour. Head 'em out.
It's OK. Don't worry. It'll be OK.
Tracker on-line. Set the V-gain to filter R-F ambient.
Hudson, tracker on-line. Left and right, little buddy.
You heard the man. Don't bunch up. Stay loose.
Your transmission's showing a lot of break-up.
Probably getting some interference from the structure.
Next one down, and proceed on a two-one-six.
I'm not making that out too well.
You tell me. I only work here.
Watch your fire and check your targets.
Remember, we're looking for civvies in here.
Tighten it up, Frost. We're getting a little thin.
Looks like some sort of secreted resin.
Lieutenant, what do those pulse-rifles fire?
They're right under the primary heat exchangers.
So if they fire their weapons in there...
won't they rupture the cooling system?
Oh, ho ho. Yeah. She's absolutely right.
This whole station is basically a big fusion reactor.
So she's talking about a thermonuclear explosion...
We can't have any firing in there.
I want you to collect magazines from everybody.
What do we use, harsh language?
Flame units only. I want rifles slung.
Just do it, Sergeant. And no grenades.
Come on, Vasquez. Clear and lock.
You, too. Give it up, Ski.
Crowe, I want it now. Give it up.
Frost, you got the duty. Open that bag.
I like to keep this handy for close encounters.
Steady, people. Let's finish our sweep.
We're still Marines, and we got a job to do.
Stay calm. We'll get you out.
We've got to get her out of here.
What is it, Dietrich? What's going on?
Go to infrared, people. Look sharp!
What's happening, Apone? We can't see anything in here.
I got readings in front and behind.
Where, man? I don't see shit.
Something's moving, and it ain't us!
They're all around us, man! Jesus!
Maybe they don't show up on infrared at all.
Jesus Christ, Apone! What is going on?
They're coming out of the goddamn walls! Let's book!
I want you to lay down a suppressing fire with...
Vasquez, Drake, hold your fire, God damn it!
Lay down a suppressing fire with the incinerators...
Lay down a suppressing fire with the incinerators...
Hicks, whoever's left, get the hell-
The Sarge is gone! Let's get the fuck out of here!
I told them to fall back.
I told them to fall back.
Ripley, what the hell are you doing?
God damn it, that's an order!
Come on. Let's go! Let's go!
It's blocked, man. We got to go around!
maybe a concussion, but he's alive.
Wake up, pendejo! I'm going to kill you!
Somebody get me a first aid kit.
The Sarge and Dietrich aren't dead, man.
Their signs are real low, but they ain't dead.
-We don't leave people behind! -I ain't going back!
Right now they're being cocooned just like the others.
Oh, dear Lord Jesus, this ain't happenin', man.
We've got seven canisters of CN-20.
I say we roll them in there and nerve gas the whole nest.
It's worth a try, but we don't know if it'll affect them.
Let's bug out and call it even. Why even talk about it?
I say we take off and nuke the entire site from orbit.
It's the only way to be sure.
This installation has a substantial dollar value.
This is an emotional moment for all of us, OK?
But let's not make snap judgments, please.
This is clearly an important species we're dealing with...
and I don't think you or I or anybody has the right...
Maybe you haven't been keeping up on current events...
but we just got our asses kicked, pal!
I'm not blind to what's going on...
but I cannot authorize that kind of action. I'm sorry.
Well, I believe Corporal Hicks has authority here.
This operation is under military jurisdiction.
Hicks is next in chain of command, right, Corporal?
this is a multimillion dollar installation, OK?
He can't make that decision. He's just a grunt.
Prep for dust-off. We need immediate evac.
I say we take off, nuke the site from orbit.
It's the only way to be sure.
Let's go. Pick it up, Hudson.
All right. Set him down here.
Hold on a second. There's something-
Well, that's great. That's just fuckin' great, man.
Now what the fuck are we supposed to do?
We're in some real pretty shit now, man!
I guess we're not gonna be leaving now, right?
You don't have to be sorry. It wasn't your fault.
That's it, man. Game over, man! Game over!
What the fuck are we gonna do now?
Maybe we could build a fire, sing a couple of songs.
We'd better get back 'cause it'll be dark soon...
and they mostly come at night.
This is absolutely everything we could salvage...
We got four pulse-rifles with about fifty rounds each.
We got fifteen of these M-40 grenades.
Yeah. It's only half-full, but it's functional.
I don't know about that one.
we got four of these robot sentries...
They really kick ass. They'll come in handy.
How long after we're declared overdue can we expect a rescue?
Hey, man, I don't wanna rain on your parade...
but we're not gonna last seventeen hours.
Those things are gonna come here like they did before, and-
This little girl survived longer than that...
with no weapons and no training.
Why don't you put her in charge?
You better just start dealing with it, Hudson.
Deal with it, because we need you...
and I'm sick of your bullshit.
Now get on a terminal and call up a floor plan file.
I need to see air ducts, electrical access tunnels...
every possible way into this complex.
I'll check on Gorman, continue my analysis.
must be how they're moving back and forth.
It moves from the processing station...
There's a pressure door at this end.
Couldn't we put a remote sentry unit in the tunnel...
but we gotta figure on them getting into the complex.
we repair the barricades at these two intersections...
...and weld plate steel over these ducts here and here...
Then they can only come at us from these two corridors.
Right. Then we put the other sentry units here...
Now all we need is a deck of cards.
Let's move like we've got a purpose.
Come on, Vasquez, let's get out of here.
"A" and "B" sentries are in place and keyed.
Great. Let's get the hell out of here.
I want you to put this on.
Then I can find you anywhere in the complex on this.
Doesn't mean we're engaged or anything.
Now lie here and have a nap.
I don't want to. I have scary dreams.
Well, I bet Casey doesn't have scary dreams.
Maybe you could just try to be like her.
Ripley, she doesn't have bad dreams...
because she's just a piece of plastic.
My mommy always said there were no monsters...
no real ones, but there are.
Why do they tell little kids that?
Most of the time it's true.
Did one of those things grow inside her?
Did you ever have a baby?
Newt, I'm gonna be right in the next room.
I can see you through that camera...
I'm not gonna leave you, Newt.
after the creature's death, completely neutralizing it.
Bishop, that's interesting, but it gets us nowhere.
I'm trying to figure out what we're dealing with.
They grab the colonists, they move them over there...
and they immobilize them to be hosts for more of these.
Which means there would have to be a lot of these parasites.
One for each colonist. That's over a hundred, at least.
Each one of these things comes from an egg, right?
It must be something we haven't seen yet.
Hey, maybe it's like an ant hive.
-Bees have hives. -You know what I mean.
There's, like, one female that runs the whole show.
And she's badass, man. I mean big.
Bishop, I want these specimens destroyed...
as soon as you're finished with them.
they were to be kept alive for return to the Company labs.
He was very specific about it.
Those two specimens are worth millions...
If you're smart, we can both come out of this heroes...
and we will be set up for life.
You're crazy, Burke. Do you know that?
Do you think you can get a dangerous organism...
How can they impound it if they don't know about it?
But they will know about it, Burke. From me.
Just like they'll know you were responsible...
for the deaths of one hundred fifty-seven colonists.
-You sent them to that ship. -You're wrong.
I just checked the colony log...
directive dated 6-12-79, signed Burke, Carter J.
You sent them out there and didn't even warn them.
Why didn't you warn them, Burke?
What if that ship didn't even exist?
Did you think about that? I didn't know.
So if I made a major security situation out of it...
and there's no exclusive rights for anybody.
Nobody wins. I made a decision, and it was wrong.
It was a bad call, Ripley.
Bad call? These people are dead, Burke!
Haven't you any idea what you've done?
I'm gonna make sure they nail you right to the wall.
You're not gonna sleaze your way out of this one.
You know, I expected more from you.
I thought you'd be smarter than this.
Look at those ammo counters go.
Man, it's a shooting gallery down there.
Bishop here. I'm afraid I have some bad news.
It's very pretty, but what are we looking for?
That's beautiful, man. That beats it all.
with a blast radius of thirty kilometers...
Why can't we shut it down from here?
The crash caused too much damage.
An overload was inevitable at this point.
Oh, man, I was getting short.
Now I'm going to buy it on this rock.
We need the other drop-ship from the Sulaco.
Can't we bring it down on remote?
The transmitter was on the APC. It's wasted.
I don't care how. We better think of a way.
Think of what? We're fucked! We're doomed!
Shut up! What about the colony transmitters?
The uplink tower at the other end?
The hard-wiring between here and there was damaged.
Somebody's gonna have to go out there...
take a portable terminal and patch in manually.
Yeah, sure. With those things running around?
We can count you out of everything.
I'm the only one qualified to remote-pilot the ship.
Yeah, right, man. Bishop should go.
Believe me, I'd prefer not to.
I may be synthetic, but I'm not stupid.
This conduit runs almost to the uplink assembly-
an hour to patch in and align the antenna...
thirty minutes to prep the ship...
and about fifty minutes flight time.
A hundred and fifty rounds on "D."
Next time they walk right up and knock.
Yeah, but they don't know that.
They're probably looking for other ways to get in.
I want you two walking perimeter.
We can't afford to let one of those bastards in here.
How long's it been since you got any sleep?
Hicks, I'm not gonna end up like those others.
You'll take care of it, won't you?
If it comes to that, I'll do us both.
Let's just make sure it doesn't come to that, all right?
Hey, I want to introduce you to a personal friend of mine.
This is an M-41A pulse-rifle, ten millimeter...
with an over-and-under 30 millimeter grenade launcher.
All right, it will kick some.
When the counter reads zero here, you...
Get another one in quick. Slap it in hard.
Now you're ready to rock 'n' roll.
I don't think you want to mess with that.
You started this. Show me everything.
All right, I guess. One hell of a hangover.
